resources.title: Blue Ocean Niche Prompt
resources.tagline: Stop copy-pasting viral channels. Combine niches into your own blue ocean.
resources.description: Most people see a viral video and clone it. This prompt does the opposite: it uses winning channel data + live research to bend niches together and invent adjacent, unsaturated territory — your own blue ocean, not someone else's red one. Attach titles/transcripts/outliers, paste today's date, get a ranked idea slate.
